completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part monolith: frontend (SolidJS), backend (Rust/Tauri), sidecar (Node.js)
Found 13 existing docs in docs/, 17 tech specs + 4 research docs in _bmad-output/
Tech stack: Tauri v2, SolidJS, Rust, xterm.js, git2, Claude Agent SDK, fastembed/RVF
Deep scan: 23 Rust services (~6700 LOC), 44 IPC commands, 7 model modules, 17 components, 6 stores, 8 IPC wrappers, 2 sidecars
Source tree documented: ~98 source files, ~14,090 LOC total
Dev/deployment documented: 5 CI workflows, Bun toolchain, Biome linter
Architecture doc written: event-driven + functional core pattern
Supporting docs written: project-overview, data-models, component-inventory, development-guide
Master index generated with all generated + existing docs linked

findings.project_classification: Multi-part monolith, desktop type, 3 parts (frontend, backend, sidecar)
